description.ko: 회전하는 유리 렌즈 배열이 백색광을 밝은 스펙트럼 리본과 초승달 형태의 카스틱으로 분산시킵니다.
description.en: A spinning array of glass lenses fractures white light into bright spectral ribbons and crescent caustics.

prompt: A radiant white void filled by a levitating turbine of four ultra-clear plano-convex glass lenses, each lens tilted at a different angle and caught mid-spin like a precision optical instrument. Thin sheets of white light sweep through the rotating lenses and fracture into intersecting, razor-bright ribbons of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics bloom as crisp crescent arcs on the surrounding air, with layered chromatic aberration glowing along every curved glass rim. Sparse floating spark points only, fast diagonal motion trails, intense clean brightness, polished refraction paths, futuristic pure-energy atmosphere, no solid background except luminous optical haze.
